text.title: Communications Management Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Communications Management end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: stakeholder-inventory
step.action: Enumerate stakeholder groups; group by interest+power.

step.name: matrix-author
step.action: Author row per stakeholder × artefact with channel, owner, cadence, format, escalation.
step.decision-gate: If any row lacks escalation, STOP.

step.name: decision-log-bootstrap
step.action: Create append-only decision log at a fixed URI.

step.name: meeting-cadence-set
step.action: Author meeting cadence with owners + agenda templates.
step.decision-gate: If no decision-bearing meeting present, add at least one.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run validator. Publish to project repo. Announce to stakeholders.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix violations before publishing.
